Container.Name: Spokes
Container.Overview: Spokes is a self-hosted voice, video, and chat server built on .NET, LiveKit, and Casdoor. It features secure identity provider integration, automated backups, and file-based data persistence with complete data ownership.
Container.Description: Spokes is a self-hosted voice, video, and chat server built on .NET, LiveKit, and Casdoor. It features secure identity provider integration, automated backups, and file-based data persistence with complete data ownership.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: The port for the Spokes Web UI interface.

Config.Name: Voice TCP Fallback Port
Config.Description: LiveKit TCP fallback port for voice traffic. Must be mapped 1-to-1.

Config.Name: Voice UDP Port Range
Config.Description: LiveKit UDP port range for voice/video traffic. Must be mapped 1-to-1.

Config.Name: App Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent data folder where configuration, DB, and logs are stored.

Config.Name: Master Password
Config.Description: Required. The master password used to securely encrypt the escrow keys for Public and Team channels. Do not lose this password!

Config.Name: Voice UDP Start Port
Config.Description: The starting port for LiveKit UDP voice/video traffic. Must match the host UDP port mapping.

Config.Name: Voice UDP Port Count
Config.Description: The number of UDP ports for LiveKit. Must match the size of the host UDP port range.

Config.Name: Voice Fallback Port
Config.Description: TCP fallback port for LiveKit. Must match the host TCP fallback port mapping.

Config.Name: Data Path Variable
Config.Description: Internal container data path. Do not change unless you have a custom folder layout inside the container.
